name: HRC_TXN_BPEL_NTF_ARCHIVE
description: hrc_txn_bpel_ntf_archive table: Holds the archived entries from hrc_txn_bpel_ntf table.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This coloumn reveals the id of the BPEL notification table

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Transaction ID associated with the notification

columns.Name: COMPONENT_NAME
columns.Comments: This coloumn reveals to which process this coloumn belongs to

columns.Name: DESTINATIONADDRESS
columns.Comments: Addess at which notification is received

columns.Name: WFTASKID
columns.Comments: This is the task id of coloumn

columns.Name: WFTASKVERSION
columns.Comments: This is the task version id of the coloumn

columns.Name: NTF_CREATEDTIME
columns.Comments: The time at which notification is triggered

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: IS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: This coloumn reveals whether this has already been processed or not

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
